title: Lastrea prolixa
taxonomy: Lastrea prolixa is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It belongs to the genus Lastrea, which is a group of ferns found in Asia. The genus Lastrea is part of the order Polypodiales, a large and diverse group of ferns. This species is native to parts of Asia, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns in the region. The classification of Lastrea prolixa is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular data.
